transcript: Speaker A: तू किती दिवसांपासून करतोयस? [How many days have you been doing this?] Speaker B: तसं पाहितलं तर १०-१२ दिवस झाले असेल. [If you look at it, it must have been 10-12 days.] Speaker A: हो? मग आता बेटर वाटतंय का? [Oh? So does it feel better now?] Speaker B: हो म्हणजे बोलून दाखवतो. I speak English very confidently now. [Yes, I mean, let me speak and show you. I speak English very confidently now.] Speaker A: अरे भारी! मस्त इंग्लिश बोलायला लागलास तू. [Oh great! You have started speaking English very well.] Speaker C: MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटी लोक स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतात. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people practice spoken English on the MySivi app. You should also start today. Trial for just 1 Rupee.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Rani. Akash. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:13 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. MySivi. Start English Learning - MySivi. 10M+ Downloads. Install. MySivi Premium. ₹1. Limited time offer. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher. 500+ Exercises and Lessons. Unlimited Access.
summary: The ad showcases a conversation between two users practicing English on the MySivi app, demonstrating rapid progress. It highlights that over 10 million users trust the platform and promotes a trial offer for just 1 Rupee.
